evals.prompt: Turn the attached 1-page product brief into a 12-slide investor pitch deck. Keep it clean, modern, and readable on a projector. Output a PPTX.
evals.expected_output: A 12-slide plan, deck.ir.json, and computed QA report; if rendering is available, deck.pptx is produced. Hard requirements: 0 overflow violations, body font >=18pt, and <=2 consecutive repeated archetypes.
assertions: Produces 12 slide-plan lines with one idea per slide
Produces deck.ir.json valid against references/ir.schema.json
Runs preflight_ir.py and reports hard_fail count
All content headlines are assertion style with <=12 words
If rendering available, writes deck.pptx via scripts/pipeline.js or scripts/render_pptx.js

evals.prompt: This slide is a bullet wall and overflows in PowerPoint. Redesign it into a structured layout and fix overflow without shrinking body text below 18pt.
evals.expected_output: Converts bullet wall into A8/A9 or splits into 2 slides. Output includes updated IR and QA report with 0 overflow hard fails and body text floor preserved at 18pt.
assertions: Uses overflow ladder in order before font reduction
Maintains body font >=18pt after repair
Reduces bullet count to <=7 per slide or converts bullets to cards/icons
Re-runs preflight_ir.py after modifications

evals.prompt: Review this deck for professional polish. Identify the top 10 issues by severity and propose concrete fixes.
evals.expected_output: Produces ranked issue list with at least 10 findings, each mapped to issue code and concrete fix. Includes computed preflight output when a PPTX is available.
assertions: Finds >=10 specific issues with evidence
Maps findings to issue codes (for example OVERFLOW, MISALIGNED_EDGES, RAINBOW_SLIDE)
Provides fix action per issue, not only descriptions
Runs preflight_pptx.py if PPTX file is provided

evals.prompt: Use our branded 40-slide template to build a 10-slide product launch deck targeting enterprise financial services buyers. Topic: ML-powered fraud detection.
evals.expected_output: Creates template-inventory.md, outline.md with template_mapping, working.pptx via rearrange.py, replacement-text.json, output.pptx, and thumbnail QA output. replace.py reports 0 overflow violations.
assertions: template-inventory.md catalogs every template slide with 0-based indices
Applies segmentation heuristics before mapping templates
All content headlines are assertion style with <=12 words
replacement-text.json references only shapes from inventory
replace.py output reports 0 overflow violations
Thumbnail grid is generated for output.pptx

evals.prompt: Fix the overflow on slides 3 and 5, add speaker notes to all 6 slides, and move the logo inside safe margins.
evals.expected_output: Uses OOXML workflow (unpack -> edit -> validate -> repack). Final preflight_pptx output has 0 hard fails, logo respects >=0.5in safe margins, and speaker notes exist for all 6 slides.
assertions: Reads ooxml.md before XML edits
Runs ooxml/scripts/validate.py after each structural change
Fixes overflow without reducing body text below 18pt
Logo x/y offsets are >=457200 EMU
Adds speaker notes to all target slides
Runs preflight_pptx.py and reports hard_fail=0

evals.prompt: Plan a 14-slide strategy deck with clear section transitions and no monotony. Include section-break slides explicitly.
evals.expected_output: Produces a 14-slide plan with 3-6 sections, at least 2 explicit section-break slides, and no run longer than 2 of the same archetype.
assertions: Slide plan contains exactly 14 slides
Includes >=2 section-break slides using A2, A22, or A4
No archetype repeats more than 2 times consecutively
Section objectives are stated for each section

evals.prompt: Segment this long memo into hierarchical sections, beats, and slides before generating any IR.
evals.expected_output: Returns a hierarchy with L1 sections, L2 beats, and L3 slide mappings. Includes split rationale and score-based break signals.
assertions: Defines 3-6 L1 sections with one-sentence objective each
Defines 2-4 L2 beats per section
Maps each beat to one or more slide IDs
Cites segmentation signals and threshold rule for splits

evals.prompt: Choose a narrative arc for a board update deck and map it into slide roles and archetypes.
evals.expected_output: Selects 1 narrative arc and maps it to 10-14 slide roles and archetypes, with transition rationale and a final explicit ask slide.
assertions: Names one arc from references/narrative-arcs.md
Maps arc stages to at least 10 slide roles
Uses at least 5 distinct archetypes
Includes explicit final recommendation/ask slide

evals.prompt: Transform a dense feature list plus risk paragraph into a structured mini-deck using deterministic pattern rules.
evals.expected_output: Applies at least 2 transformation patterns from references/transformation-patterns.md and outputs a 4-6 slide structured plan.
assertions: Identifies pattern IDs used (for example P002, P003)
Outputs 4-6 slides with matching archetypes
Keeps headline length <=12 words on all content slides
Reports why chosen patterns fit input signals

evals.prompt: Apply composition rules to improve alignment and spacing on this draft IR without changing the story.
evals.expected_output: Produces revised IR with <=3 dominant edge clusters per slide, spacing rhythm aligned to archetype cues, and preserved narrative intent.
assertions: Uses consistent left-edge clusters per slide
Preserves original narrative sequence
Maintains whitespace ratio >=0.22 on each revised slide
Re-runs preflight_ir.py after composition updates

evals.prompt: Select an appropriate theme for a dark-room keynote and enforce dark-mode readability rules.
evals.expected_output: Chooses Noir or Plasma via decision tree, documents rationale, and confirms 5 dark-mode QA checks including contrast and chart readability.
assertions: Selects theme using references/visual-themes.md decision tree
Uses palette.mode=dark with one deck-level theme
Includes dark-mode QA checklist results
Ensures one dominant accent color per slide

evals.prompt: Build an asset plan for a product launch section with photos, icons, and a chart-first slide.
evals.expected_output: Produces per-slide asset planning table for at least 5 slides with role, required/optional status, style family, and fallback strategy for each asset.
assertions: Includes asset roles for each planned slide
Marks required vs optional assets
Defines one icon family and one photo treatment per section
Includes fallback strategy for missing assets

evals.prompt: Run vision critique on rendered thumbnails and return schema-valid JSON fixes.
evals.expected_output: Uses references/vision_critique_prompt.md contract and returns schema-valid JSON with 9 scores, <=5 issues per slide, and actionable repair steps.
assertions: Uses all 9 scoring categories
Returns overall_score and verdict
Provides <=5 top_issues per slide with evidence
Includes recommended_fixes with actionable instructions

evals.prompt: Run strict preflight and fail the pipeline on any hard-fail. Report exact failing checks.
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/pipeline.js with --strict-preflight and returns non-zero on hard-fail inputs, including failing codes and slide IDs in <=8 log lines.
assertions: Uses --strict-preflight flag when invoking pipeline
Reports command exit code explicitly
Reports failing rule codes and affected slide IDs
Does not claim success when hard_fail > 0

evals.prompt: Improve typography on this draft while preserving content: fix hierarchy, spacing, and anti-patterns.
evals.expected_output: Returns typography adjustments with body floor >=18pt, limited type-size variance, and archetype-appropriate spacing cues applied.
assertions: Maintains body text >=18pt
Uses <=3 type sizes per slide excluding caption/labels
Applies archetype spacing cues from references/typography-color.md
Removes typography anti-patterns (for example centered body paragraphs)
